title: ursinia filiformis
intro: Ursinia filiformis, also known as the yellow daisy or small-flowered ursinia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. Ursinia filiformis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
